title: Pockets
description: Gives leather pants pockets to store items in.
body:
# Pockets

This simple mod makes leather leggings more useful to wear, by giving them pockets -- essentially making them act like a bundle, in addition to being wearable and providing defense.

It can also be configured with a datapack to enable other armor items to have pockets as well, or restrict certain items from being inserted. See [the GitHub page](https://github.com/apace100/pockets) for more information.

![Screenshot of the player's inventory screen hovering over leather pants in the leggings slot, showing that they're storing a number of items](https://i.imgur.com/6AIyL2z.png)
